svg.text: Connected self-hosted workflow with replay, deduplication, and tamper controls
Control Layer Embedded Into The Workflow
MinIO versioning, Iceberg snapshots, replay from Kafka retention
Deterministic event keys, stateful dedup, idempotent Iceberg writes
Controlled ops, audit logs, ACL failures, suspicious delete and lag signals
1. Replay survives through Kafka retention and versioned MinIO storage.
2. Curated data remains trusted through deterministic deduplication and Iceberg semantics.
3. Deletion and tampering are recoverable through snapshots, versioning, and controlled operations.
4. Serving can be rebuilt from curated layers instead of depending on one mutable downstream copy.
